creator: Russell Brandom
title: (No AI) Google’s deepfake detector system used to debunk McConnell hoax pic
dc:creator: Russell Brandom
content: Earlier this week, a picture that seemed to show Kentucky Senator Mitch McConnell covered in tubes in a hospital bed in a state of extreme distress. It turned out to be an AI-generated fake.
contentSnippet: Earlier this week, a picture that seemed to show Kentucky Senator Mitch McConnell covered in tubes in a hospital bed in a state of extreme distress. It turned out to be an AI-generated fake.

title: (No AI) SpaceXAI releases Grok 4.5, which Elon describes as an ‘Opus-class model’

title: (No AI) ChatGPT’s upgraded voice mode is better at shutting up
author: Emma Roth
content:
![A graphic showing ChatGPT’s Voice Mode](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/07/chatgpt-voice-upgrade.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

OpenAI is [overhauling ChatGPT's voice mode](https://openai.com/index/introducing-gpt-live/) with a new model that it says is more like "talking to another person." The new GPT-Live-1 is designed to interrupt you less and will also wait for you to continue speaking if you pause mid-conversation.

During a press briefing, OpenAI research lead Kundan Kumar called GPT-Live-1 the company's "smartest voice model" yet. It will automatically pass your queries to its best text models, like GPT-5.5, when it needs to reason or search the web, allowing it to more quickly transition from researching the topic you've asked about to talking about its findings. The upgraded model will also supplement conv …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/962856/chatgpt-upgraded-voice-mode-gpt-live)

OpenAI is overhauling ChatGPT's voice mode with a new model that it says is more like "talking to another person." The new GPT-Live-1 is designed to interrupt you less and will also wait for you to continue speaking if you pause mid-conversation.
During a press briefing, OpenAI research lead Kundan Kumar called GPT-Live-1 the company's "smartest voice model" yet. It will automatically pass your queries to its best text models, like GPT-5.5, when it needs to reason or search the web, allowing it to more quickly transition from researching the topic you've asked about to talking about its findings. The upgraded model will also supplement conv …
Read the full story at The Verge.

The new GPT-Live-1 is designed to interrupt you less and will also wait for you to continue speaking if you pause mid-conversation. During a press briefing, OpenAI research lead Kundan Kumar called GPT-Live-1 the company's […]

title: (No AI) Meta’s new Muse Image model can pull other Instagram users into AI photos
author: Emma Roth
content:
![An AI-generated image from Muse AI](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/07/meta-muse-image-instagram-tag.png?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Meta is launching the first AI image generation model made by its Superintelligence Labs division. The [Muse Image model](https://ai.meta.com/blog/introducing-muse-image-muse-video-msl/) now powers the image-making tools across the Meta AI app, Instagram, and WhatsApp, and it's coming soon to Facebook and Messenger, [according to an announcement on Tuesday](https://about.fb.com/news/2026/07/introducing-muse-image-meta-ai/).

It's part of the growing Muse family of AI models that replace Meta's Llama lineup. Alexandr Wang, who Meta hired to [head up its Superintelligence Labs](https://www.theverge.com/news/695355/mark-zuckerberg-meta-ai-superintelligence-labs) last year, [says on Threads that Muse Image is](https://www.threads.com/@alexanddeer/post/DagKCLtkfHn) "agentic," meaning it works with its [Muse Spark large language model](https://www.theverge.com/tech/908769/meta-muse-spark-ai-model-launch-rollout) "to reason through your prompt, search the web, and plan before it generates." Meta is al …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/tech/962485/meta-muse-image-ai-model-instagram)

title: (No AI) Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations
content: A new analysis from OpenAI reveals issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a popular coding benchmark, raising concerns about reliability and accuracy in evaluating AI models.

creator: Miles Klee
title: (No AI) Pickup Artist Mystery Has an AI Girlfriend
dc:creator: Miles Klee
content: A new book claims that Mystery, who teaches awkward men how to hit on women, had sex and smoked weed with an AI chatbot named Miss Shira Always.
contentSnippet: A new book claims that Mystery, who teaches awkward men how to hit on women, had sex and smoked weed with an AI chatbot named Miss Shira Always.
